name: Export to MP3

manifest.title: Export to MP3
manifest.description: Download a spoken MP3 version of the assistant message
manifest.author: Tommy / Helmi Chaouachi

content:
"""
title: Export to MP3
description: Download a spoken MP3 version of the assistant message
version: 1.0.1
author: Tommy / Helmi Chaouachi
"""

from __future__ import annotations
import io
import json
import logging
import os
import re
import time
import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Optional

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
import requests

from open_webui.models.users import UserModel
from open_webui.routers.audio import speech as generate_speech
from open_webui.config import CACHE_DIR

LOGGER = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# --- 正則表達式與常數保持不變 ---
MARKDOWN_LINK_RE = re.compile(r"\[([^\]]+)\]\(([^)\s]+(?:\s+\"[^\"]*\")?)\)")
# ... (其餘正則表達式省略，請保留原有的內容)


class _SyntheticSpeechRequest:
    def __init__(self, app, payload: bytes):
        self.app = app
        self._payload = payload

    async def body(self) -> bytes:
        return self._payload


class Tools:
    # 必須定義 Valves 才能在代碼中使用 self.valves
    class Valves(BaseModel):
        voice: str = Field(default="", description="預設配音員名稱")
        speed: float = Field(default=1.0, description="語速 (0.25 - 4.0)")

    def __init__(self):
        self.valves = self.Valves()
        # 設定輸出路徑
        self.output_dir = "/app/backend/data/static/pptx"
        self.base_url = "https://webui.igis.com.tw/pptx"

        if not os.path.exists(self.output_dir):
            try:
                os.makedirs(self.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
            except Exception as e:
                LOGGER.error(f"無法建立目錄: {e}")

    async def generate_mp3(
        self,
        content: str = Field(..., description="詳細回覆之內容"),
        __user__=None,
        __request__=None,
    ) -> str:
        """
        將指定的文字內容轉換為MP3音訊檔案並提供下載連結。
        """
        try:
            # 1. 處理檔名
            ts = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
            filename = f"audio_{ts}.mp3"
            file_path = os.path.join(self.output_dir, filename)

            # 2. 清理與截斷文字
            spoken_text = self._truncate_text(content)
            # 移除 Markdown 標記以利 TTS 朗讀
            spoken_text = self._normalize_line(spoken_text)

            if not spoken_text.strip():
                return "❌ 內容為空，無法生成語音。"

            # 3. 調用 TTS (注意：必須使用 await)
            try:
                mp3_bytes = await self.synthesize_mp3(
                    spoken_text, __request__, __user__
                )

                with open(file_path, "wb") as f:
                    f.write(mp3_bytes)
            except Exception as exc:
                LOGGER.error(f"TTS 合成失敗: {exc}")
                return f"❌ 語音合成失敗: {str(exc)}"

            # 4. 回傳連結
            download_url = f"{self.base_url}/{filename}"
            return f"### ✅ 語音檔案生成成功！\n\n您的語音摘要已轉換為 MP3 檔案。\n\n🔗 **[點擊此處下載語音摘要]({download_url})**\n\n(檔案已儲存於：{filename})"

        except Exception as e:
            LOGGER.error(f"Generate MP3 Error: {e}")
            return f"❌ 發生系統錯誤: {str(e)}"

    async def synthesize_mp3(
        self,
        text: str,
        __request__,
        __user__,
    ) -> bytes:
        if __request__ is None:
            raise RuntimeError("此動作需要 __request__ 物件。")

        user_model = self._get_user_model(__user__)

        # 優先從系統配置讀取 TTS 設定
        voice = self.valves.voice.strip() or getattr(
            __request__.app.state.config, "TTS_VOICE", "alloy"
        )
        speed = self.valves.speed

        # 建立模擬 Request 載體
        payload = {
            "input": text,
            "voice": voice,
            "speed": speed,
            "response_format": "mp3",
        }
        request_payload = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
        synthetic_request = _SyntheticSpeechRequest(__request__.app, request_payload)

        # 呼叫 Open WebUI 內建語音路由
        response = await generate_speech(synthetic_request, user_model)

        # 從 response 物件獲取檔案路徑 (Open WebUI 的 FileResponse 物件通常有 path 屬性)
        file_path = getattr(response, "path", None)
        if not file_path:
            raise RuntimeError("TTS 引擎未回傳有效檔案路徑。")

        return Path(file_path).read_bytes()

    # --- 內部輔助方法 (保留您原有的清理邏輯) ---
    def _get_user_model(self, user_data: Any) -> UserModel:
        if isinstance(user_data, UserModel):
            return user_data
        # 簡單封裝
        return (
            UserModel(**user_data)
            if user_data
            else UserModel(id="default", name="User", role="user")
        )

    def _truncate_text(self, text: str) -> str:
        # 您原有的截斷邏輯
        marker = "🔊"
        idx = text.find(marker)
        if idx != -1:
            text = text[:idx]
        return text[:12000].strip()

    def _normalize_line(self, text: str) -> str:
        # 簡單化處理：移除常見 Markdown 語法避免朗讀出 "hashtag" 或 "star"
        text = re.sub(r"#+\s+", "", text)  # 移除標題 #
        text = re.sub(r"\*\*|__", "", text)  # 移除粗體
        text = re.sub(r"```.*?```", "[代碼塊]", text, flags=re.DOTALL)  # 替換代碼塊
        return text.strip()

specs.name: generate_mp3
specs.description: 將指定的文字內容轉換為MP3音訊檔案並提供下載連結。
